prompt: Generate a photorealistic portrait of [person] built entirely from thousands of tiny human figures, viewed from directly overhead. The miniature people vary in density to sculpt the subject's facial features, shadows, and contours, tightly clustered in dark areas like hair and deep shadows, loosely scattered across lighter skin tones and the white background. Each small figure casts a realistic shadow and shows distinct clothing when zoomed in. The portrait reads clearly as a face from a distance while individual people remain distinguishable at full resolution. Hyperdetailed, soft warm lighting, white or off-white background.
